meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no understanding of APIs (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no understanding of APIs. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: no understanding of APIs

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding & API Integration
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between no API knowledge and professional SaaS development. Master user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert guide.
content.answer_block: To overcome your lack of API experience, focus on building a robust user onboarding flow. By treating onboarding as a structured data pipeline, you learn how to handle user authentication, state management, and external API requests systematically, transforming abstract concepts into a functional, portfolio-ready product that recruiters actually value.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank terminal, the weight of 'API integration' looming like an insurmountable wall. Most students get stuck here—paralyzed by the complexity of endpoints, headers, and authentication flows. It feels like you’re trying to build a skyscraper without knowing how to lay the foundation.

But here is the secret: APIs are just conversations between machines. Once you master the art of user onboarding, you’ve essentially built the first bridge in that conversation. We are going to strip away the noise and use Antigravity and Claude Code to turn your confusion into a deployment-ready feature.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Schema
steps.description: Before hitting an API, you must map your user data. Define the structure of your onboarding flow to ensure data integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a JSON schema for a SaaS user onboarding flow including name, email, and preferences, with validation rules for each field.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding_schema.json based on provided specifications'

steps.title: Build the API Mock Server
steps.description: Don't touch real APIs yet. Mock your endpoints to understand request/response cycles without hitting rate limits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Node.js mock server using Express that simulates a POST request to /api/onboarding with a 201 success response.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm install express && node server.js'

steps.title: Implement Client-Side State Management
steps.description: Use a state manager to track the onboarding progress, ensuring the UI stays in sync with your API calls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook for managing the state of a multi-step onboarding form, including loading and error handling states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'src/hooks/useOnboarding.js' --apply 'add loading and error handling to the hook'

steps.title: Integrate Authentication Headers
steps.description: Learn the professional way to secure API requests using Bearer tokens during the initial onboarding handshake.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Axios interceptor that automatically attaches a JWT token to headers for all onboarding API requests.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'integrate axios interceptor into src/api/client.js'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Run final integration tests to ensure your onboarding flow correctly communicates with the backend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest test suite for the onboarding flow that verifies successful API communication and UI feedback.

pro_tips: Always implement an 'optimistic UI'—update the frontend state before the API responds to make your app feel lightning fast.
Use environment variables for all API keys; never hardcode credentials, even in student projects.
Treat your API documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI) as your source of truth before writing a single line of code.
Implement 'graceful degradation'—if your API call fails, ensure the user can still save their progress locally.
Monitor network requests in the browser console; it is the single most important diagnostic tool for a junior developer.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding is functional, move to implementing protected routes and database persistence to turn this into a full-scale MVP.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming about building apps and start shipping them. Our curriculum is designed to turn beginners into engineers who understand the architecture behind the code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
